description: Lobbying disclosure records with local sync, entity resolution, and evidence-grade exports.

novel_features.name: Filing Anomaly Audit
novel_features.description: Flag amendments, terminations, duplicate-risk filings, client/registrant conflicts, and missing source URLs.

novel_features.name: Entity Resolve Dossier
novel_features.description: Rank matching registrants, clients, and lobbyists with official IDs, counts, last activity, and source URLs.

novel_features.name: Lobbying Spend Timeline
novel_features.description: Aggregate disclosed lobbying income and expenses by client, registrant, issue, year, and quarter.

novel_features.name: Relationship Graph Export
novel_features.description: Export client-registrant-lobbyist-issue-government entity edges for graph analysis.

novel_features.name: Contribution Counterparty Totals
novel_features.description: Aggregate LD-203 contribution items by contributor, recipient, payee, item type, year, and report.

novel_features.name: Quarterly Activity Report
novel_features.description: Produce quarter stats for filings, amendments, terminations, top issues, top entities, spend, and LD-203 totals.

novel_features.name: Covered Positions Map
novel_features.description: List lobbyists' covered government positions connected to clients, registrants, and filing periods.
